canProve(address,uint8,uint256).details: Useful for UX to show if user can prove something before committing

submitZKProof(bytes,bytes32[]).details: For full ZK-SNARK proofs generated off-chain

returns.valid: Whether the proof is valid and not expired

canProve(address,uint8,uint256).notice: Check if a proof would succeed without revealing the actual value

createCommitment(uint8,bytes32).notice: Create a commitment to prove something about your reputation

proveEndorsementCount(uint256,bytes32).notice: Prove you have at least X endorsements

proveNoDisputeLosses(bytes32).notice: Prove you have never lost a dispute

proveScoreAbove(uint256,bytes32).notice: Generate a proof that your score is above a threshold

proveScoreInRange(uint256,uint256,bytes3.notice: Generate a proof that your score is in a range

proveTrustTier(uint8,bytes32).notice: Prove you're in a specific trust tier

submitZKProof(bytes,bytes32[]).notice: Submit an off-chain generated ZK proof

verifyProof(bytes32).notice: Verify a proof is valid (for third parties to check)
